author: TheFermiSea
text: CODE REVIEW: APPROVED - Dynamic feature discovery + DB persistence pipeline complete, all quality gates passed (134 driver tests + 9 integration tests, zero clippy warnings, no circular deps, comprehensive error handling). Stack: introspection.rs (1224 lines) → register_dynamic_features() → schema v6 → reconciler hooks → integration tests. Ready to merge.
